title: AmNyam Pack
description: Texture pack with Om Nom and customized russian subtitles!
body:
An entire texture pack that is maked up by to Om Nom (Am Nyam), it is contains at least an om nom totem, blue&green armor(diamond&netherite), animated diamond and netherite swords, candy as a golden apples and etc!
(soon it will probably have an update! works perfectly on 1.12.2, soon i'll do support to english language and new items)
